content.entity: Sweat440 Franchise Systems, LLC, wholly-owned subsidiary of Brickhouse Athletics, LLC
content.business: Sell franchises for membership-driven fitness studios under license agreement dated June 3, 2019
content.fiscal_year_change: Changed from October 31 to December 31 effective November 1, 2023. Current period is 14 months, not comparable to prior 12-month years.
content.limited_liability: Member not liable for debts unless specific guarantee signed

policies.use_of_estimates: Estimates used for revenue recognition and uncertain tax positions
policies.concentration_of_credit_risk: Cash may exceed FDIC limits; placed with high credit quality institutions

revenue_recognition.franchise_fees: IFF and MUD fees are nonrefundable, collected at signing. Recognized as revenue on straight-line basis over franchise agreement term (10 years). MUD fees deferred and apportioned pro-rata to each FA signed.
revenue_recognition.royalties: Sales-based, recognized as franchisee sales occur and deemed collectible. 7% of gross revenues, payable weekly.
revenue_recognition.technology_fees: Amended to fixed fees per month starting 2022. Recognized as incurred.
revenue_recognition.brand_fund: Fixed $420/month. Company acts as principal — revenues and expenses recognized on gross basis. Single performance obligation with IP access.
revenue_recognition.equipment: Recognized when control transfers to franchisee upon vendor delivery. Company acts as principal (gross basis). Cost of revenue: $219,985 (2023), $144,208 (2022). Franchisees purchase directly from vendors post-Oct 2023.
revenue_recognition.vendor_rebates: Revenue share from vendors based on percentage/volume of franchisee equipment purchases. Recognized when purchases made.
revenue_recognition.other_revenues: Recognized as services rendered or payment received.
revenue_recognition.performance_obligation: Single performance obligation — IP access and preopening activities are highly interrelated and interdependent

policies.incremental_costs: Commissions capitalized and amortized over FA/MUD term. MUD-related costs deferred until FA signed.

receivables.accounts_receivable: Billed amounts for royalties, brand fund, tech fees
receivables.franchise_fees_receivable: $189,000 at Dec 31 2024 — NET of $945,000 in fees owed and $756,000 in commissions to same party
receivables.allowance: No allowance required at Dec 31 2024 or Oct 31 2023
receivables.credit_loss_assessment: Collective basis review, historical collectibility, creditworthiness, economic conditions

income_taxes.status: Single-member LLC — disregarded entity for tax purposes
income_taxes.provision: No income tax provision. All income/loss reported on member's tax return.
income_taxes.uncertain_positions: Per ASC 740 — no uncertain tax positions at Dec 31 2024 or Oct 31 2023

policies.reclassifications: Certain prior year amounts reclassified; no effect on net loss
policies.subsequent_events: Evaluated through March 11, 2025. No material subsequent events requiring recognition or disclosure.

content.impact: No material impact on financial statements
content.description: Replaces probable threshold with lifetime expected credit loss model for financial assets at amortized cost

content.note: Note 4 shows 21 franchised outlets vs Item 20 showing 17 franchised — discrepancy likely because Note 4 includes officer-owned outlets (NYC Chelsea, Financial District, Charlotte-NoDa, Coral Gables) counted as franchised in financial reporting but as company-owned in Item 20.

license_agreement.terms: Exclusive license for SWEAT440 in USA. Perpetual until terminated. One-time fee of $100.

management_agreement.terms: Reimburse Licensor for expenses benefiting individual studios. Pro rata allocation. Starting Jan 1 2024: half to Company, half split among corporate studios.

content.description: Fixed monthly brand fund fee, may increase up to 10%/year. Used for general promotion of trademark and System. Separate accounting required.

content.litigation: From time to time involved in ordinary litigation. No material proceedings expected. No pending litigation or known threats as of March 11, 2025.

ppp_loan.risk: If determined ineligible, could be subject to penalties and required to repay.

not_present_in_financials: No depreciation/amortization of tangible assets (asset-light company — no PP&E disclosed)
No impairment policy or charges (no long-lived assets beyond prepaid commissions)
No lease accounting (ROU assets, maturity schedule) — company does not lease facilities
No debt instruments or borrowing arrangements
No pension or employee benefit obligations
